overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk nightclub featuring vibrant neon lighting in green and red hues. The camera moves smoothly through the venue past the bar area, lounge seating with patrons, and toward a stage with dramatic red lighting. This is high-quality game engine footage, likely from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing detailed interior environments with atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the nightclub entrance with prominent green neon floor lighting guiding the path forward. The camera moves through the doorway into the main club area, passing by a group of standing patrons near the entrance. The bar area with its green neon trim becomes visible on the left, establishing the cyberpunk aesthetic of the venue.

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the club, the camera passes through the lounge area featuring black leather banquette seating where groups of NPCs are seated and conversing. The stage area with its distinctive red neon circular lighting becomes visible in the distance, while the bar recedes to the left background. The green floor lighting continues to guide the path through the space.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the right side of the club, focusing on the bar counter with its extensive bottle display illuminated by warm lighting. A digital advertisement poster is visible on the wall. The stage area remains visible in the background to the left, while the leather seating area falls behind. Patrons are seen standing and interacting near the bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: performance stage with red neon lighting and smoke effects

red neon stage lighting becomes dominant as the camera approaches, shifting from green to red tones

tall vertical light poles on the stage with red illumination

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the main performance area of the nightclub, dominated by the dramatic red neon circular lighting fixtures hanging above the stage. The lighting shifts from green to intense red tones as the camera nears the stage platform. Performers are visible on stage, and the camera moves toward the stage edge, completing the tour of the venue from entrance to performance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the entrance of a cyberpunk nightclub into its deep interior, transitioning from a green-hued entryway toward a red-lit stage. It begins by gliding through the doorway, guided by prominent green neon floor lighting and passing a group of patrons standing near the entrance. As the camera moves deeper into the venue, the bar area with its matching green neon trim emerges on the left before gradually receding into the background. The scene then shifts through a lounge area filled with NPCs conversing on black leather banquettes, while the green floor lighting continues to lead the way. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a distant stage defined by distinctive red neon circular lighting.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk nightclub that transitions from a warm, social bar area into a dramatic, red-lit performance space. It begins by gliding along the right side of the venue, passing a detailed bar counter with illuminated bottle displays and a digital advertisement on the wall. As the camera moves past patrons interacting near the bar, the leather seating area recedes into the background while the distant stage comes into clearer focus. The scene then shifts in atmosphere as the lighting transforms from green hues to intense red tones, drawing the camera toward the main performance area. Finally, the movement concludes at the edge of the stage platform, directly beneath massive circular neon fixtures and facing the performers.
